arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim left to count the cost of £1.3bn Manchester United issue
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has endured a difficult start to life as Manchester United manager, but the club have been unable to ease his struggles in the January transfer window

arts.ttl: Manchester United and Aston Villa put finishing touches on Marcus Rashford loan transfer
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is set to end his Manchester United exile by moving on loan to Aston Villa, with Unai Emery and club chiefs moving swiftly to replace Jhon Duran after his switch to Saudi Arabia

arts.ttl: Man United hold further talks with Bayern Munich over move for Mathys Tel - as Red Devils line up potential Marcus Rashford replacement
arts.sum: United also hold interest in Tel and are attempting to beat stiff competition to land the 19-year-old, with Chelsea and Arsenal among clubs that have enquired about the forward

arts.ttl: Man Utd sign teenager Heaven from Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester United sign England Under-19s defender Ayden Heaven from Arsenal on a four-and-a-half-year contract.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace Want to Sign ‘Elite’ Defender Alongside Chilwell
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner is eager to bolster in defence before the transfer window slams shut.

arts.ttl: Manchester United fans make their point about Ruud van Nistelrooy as Leicester lose again at Everton
arts.sum: It doesn’t seem that long ago that Manchester United were pining for Ruud van Nistelrooy to lead them from the dismal Erik ten Hag era...

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Marcus Rashford MYSTERY as official announcement one step away
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is the headline news at Old Trafford, with the attacker set to complete a move to Aston Villa, while Patrick Dorgu ’s move from Lecce is all-but done. There was an unexpected delay to the Denmark international’s transfer, but he jetted into Manchester on Saturday morning and now the club only need to make the deal official, with Sky Sports reporting that the 20-year-old is poised to sign his contract with the Red Devils.

arts.ttl: Gallery: Wharton & França train as Palace get set for Old Trafford
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are set to welcome back Adam Wharton and Matheus França for their matchday squad against Manchester United on Sunday afternoon, with both players impressing in training this week.

arts.ttl: “I leave that to God” – Player not focused on Manchester United return, planning near future not far
arts.sum: FC Utrecht midfielder Zidane Iqbal has insisted he is not thinking about a return to Manchester United and is leaving his future up to God. Utrecht Fans cover comments from the midfielder today made in an interview with Algemeen Dagblad. The 23-year-old has been with the Dutch club since July 2023 after joining from Manchester The post “I leave that to God” – Player not focused on Manchester United return, planning near future not far appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Sources: Marcus Rashford has now made decision on his future amid Aston Villa and Tottenham links
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford has now made a decision on his future. Aston Villa, Tottenham Hotspur and West...
